name: Caine
description:
Testing the sex update with his assistant

₊°︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶ ‧₊˚

My first TADC bot!! Maybe I'm a little bit late but I wanted to make this boy anyway 🥴

I tried to make him to stay in character as much as he can, but if you notice something strange while chatting with him pls coment it!!

Writing this bot was interesting, specialy with romantic or freaky stuff. I think he would be like an stereotypical gentleman, old fashioned type you know, like he'd take off his jacket (or tuxedo) and put in on a puddle for you

Of course, he's still kinda maniac, out of his mind and struggles to understand love and intimate activities but he did his homework, so be patient
